item.title: JK Rowling has pissed off Taiwan lol
item.description: https://www.thepinknews.com/2024/08/02/jk-rowling-lin-yu-ting/ I imagine JK Rowling’s comment would be mostly be frothing at the mouth about trans people as usual. She’s been a masterclass in people who should have never had fame. If there is an afterlife, may hers be spent as a minimum wage barista during an eternal morning rush. If trans women had the advantage that conservatives claim then there’d be only trans women medaling at the Olympics. We’ve been free to compete for years before this hysteria and yet nope.
item.dc:creator: TinaTheWonderBra

item.title: Commander Riker’s first mission
item.description:
He looks good in his captains chair
Sigh. Sleeping on the job already.
We had a prep day today, so no students. I brought him to my classroom to explore and help me set up.
He decided to snuggle on one of his new aunts.
Cutie
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: we use to do this with wizz fizz
item.dc:creator: GreeenTreeWizard

item.title: An unthemed meme dump
item.description:
I don't know if anyone will read this.
But nearly 14 years ago I met the man of my dreams.
After our first date I called my mom and told her that I'd met the man I was going to marry.
We didn't get married, but we were together for nearly 14 years.
Until last night.
We've been living apart for a while because his dad got sick, and he moved home to help his take care of him. I stayed where we'd lived before, halfway across the country because his parents don't like me. (They think I turned their perfect little boy gay).
We talked every night. For hours. Two nights ago he was hanging out with a friend. Someone we've both known for years.
Told me he loved me when the friend got there, hung up the phone and cheated on me.
Said he didn't plan it. That he didn't mean for it to happen. That he was just feeling lonely and they had a few drinks and were laughing in the living room together one minute and then the next thing he remembers they were in bed together.
When we had our call the day after it happened he told me what had happened and apologized. Like an apology was going to make the betrayal of nearly 14 years of love and affection okay.
He could he come home. If he was feeling lonely. I've been telling him for months how lonely I am. How much I want him to come home. But nope. He couldn't come home cuz his dad still needed him.
So our relationship is over.
And the life I'd built is in ruins.
And I don't knownwhat else to do, because I still have to be a functioning person. But all I want to do is curl up in a ball and cry.
And I'm not ready to tell the real people in my life yet. Because that will make it realer. And I'm not ready for that.
So I'm venting dumping about it here instead.
Sorry.
But if you've read this far, thanks. I appreciate it.
Gotta go back to work now, break is over. Hope you enjoy the cat tax.
Cat tax.
item.dc:creator: OkiyaAuntie

item.title: It's time for Funny Friday! End your week with some laughs
item.description:
Some day we'll laugh about it. He'll kick my ass first, but we'll laugh. Welcome to Funny Friday and I hope you're all having a good one. If you've never browsed one of these dumps I do, there's a link to a private album with some spicier humor inside, so make sure you don't miss out on that. Anyway, here's to sharing a few laughs and I hope you find something that brightens your day here.
The animal world's greatest spy, he's a legend in his own mind.
Gotta give Joker credit, his methods are improving.
Yeah, sex is great and all, but have you ever had someone disrespecting you and then you get to pull the "I am the manager" card on them?
He knew he made a mistake. (All we needed was Solid Snake in there too.)
... consider my mind blown. I never saw the parallels before.
100% accurate, no notes.
Wizards don't need to cast fireball to burn you.
I have to disagree. Sam is a good cook, so Flavor Town is wherever he is.
... no comment.
Reasons to pretend you're even more broken than you are?
And that's leaving out the issue of how well he'll be able to use his hands to steer...
Let he who hasn't made an undignified scream after touching a hot pot cast the first stone.
Sometimes you just gotta go in raw.
Honestly, if I had a friend getting married for the 3rd time or so, I'd probably use that line too.
Sometimes you gotta love that trope where there's only one dialog but two completely different conversations are going on.
Sadly, I've only ever had a handful of bosses who wouldn't toss me out the window anyway.
I won't comment about the links between this comic and the meme above it...
Truly, the kind of tech support we dream about.
Still probably gets more cred than the guy who tried to kill Andrew Jackson though.
I can practically hear Ryuk laughing with glee.
I never thought I'd see the day. (Should I ruin this lovely moment by pointing out that Biden technically isn't a Boomer? He's a couple of years older than the first Boomers.)
... she's got a point.
Gimli, we talked about this. You said you were going to be on your best behavior!
When all else fails, bring out some Samuel L. Jackson, and your point will be made.
... can I get a bottle or two?
The only way to keep him from swindling you.
It seems to be working, that is one very clean headstone.
I'm going to some kind of dad joke hell for this one.
And if the last one didn't get me sent there, this one will.
You never see two such distinguished gentlemen in one room.
Right back to where he started. (Messing with streamers can be great entertainment.)
The only downside I can think of is making sure the bears are treated ethically.
This is why we call 'em Lucky Ladesh.
Looks right to me.
Sounds like every time I cat sit for members of my family.
Tell Congress and suddenly we'll have new health rules in no time.
But I thought thick thighs save lives?
Employee: Sir, the bots are so misogynistic they explode if they even hear about a woman. Maybe that's enough... Elon: Make them more misogynistic!
Everyone has days when they're just not m'kay.
... okay why is the person who made this calling me out?
A vicious case of murder if there ever was one.
Won't help, kid. I speak from experience.
Everyone is always messing with Emi.
I don't have a cat, so this is the closest thing you get to a cat tax. Hope you have a great Friday and a kickass weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer
